results.evidence: WorkspaceContext.tsx:536 checks raw.error before dispatching ACTIVATION_DONE; dispatches ACTIVATION_ERROR instead. Test: workspaceReducer.test.ts ACTIVATION_ERROR block
ActivationPanel.tsx:235-242 renders activationError inline with error styling. Reducer sets activationError on ACTIVATION_ERROR dispatch
WorkspaceContext.tsx:537 dispatches ACTIVATION_ERROR on error, skips history append (line 558 only reached in else branch). Test: reducer test verifies no history entry on error
WorkspaceContext.tsx:658 throws new Error(data.error) in done event parser for generateActivationPrompts, caught by outer catch at line 682 which dispatches GENERATE_PROMPTS_ERROR
activation-tester.ts resolvePrompts calls onProgress('classifying', ++autoIndex, autoTotal) after each classifyExpectation. api-routes.ts wires onProgress to sendSSE(res, phase, {index, total})
api-routes.ts emits SSE event with phase name 'classifying' and {index, total} payload. Frontend can display via existing SSE cursor pattern
activation-tester.ts only calls onProgress inside the if(meta) branch when p.expected==='auto'. Test: 'does not call onProgress when all prompts have explicit expected'
ActivationPanel.tsx:127-134 renders hint div with aria-live='polite' when !cleanDescription && !activationRunning. Test: ActivationPanel.test.tsx
Condition !cleanDescription is false when description exists, so hint div is not rendered. Test: ActivationPanel.test.tsx 'does not render hint when activationRunning is true'
api-routes.ts activation-prompts endpoint now uses extractDescription() which falls back to skillContent body instead of returning 400. The 400 guard for empty description removed
extractDescription() checks frontmatter description first, returns it if found. Both endpoints use same function. Test: activation-description.test.ts
api-routes.ts wraps client.generate with withHeartbeat(res, undefined, 'generating', ...) which emits progress SSE events every 3s. Test: activation-prompts-heartbeat.test.ts
withHeartbeat clears interval in finally block (sse-helpers.ts:121). When generate completes, heartbeat stops. Test: 'does not emit heartbeat when call completes quickly'
